description: The /api/clerk-key endpoint fetch has no error handling for network failures during the retry loop (lines 170-198). If all retries fail due to network issues, the user sees a generic error message but the app doesn't attempt to recover. Should distinguish between server errors (5xx) and network errors, and provide actionable guidance.
successCriteria: Network errors (AbortError, fetch failures) are distinguished from server errors
Error messages specify whether to refresh or wait for server recovery
Failed network requests don't count against retry limit for server errors
